series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to requests received by the Division from persons, other government entities, or individuals who formerly or currently maintain a license, certificate, registration or other credential issued by the Division and the Division''s response to that request. The Division''s response may include, but is not limited to, a pre-printed form, a letter or correspondence along with any attachments that supplements the response. These records may contain confidential information such as an appraiser''s home address which is confidential pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Section 4763.05(A)(1)(a).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Letters of good standing maintained in paper form shall be maintained six months from date letter of good standing is sent by Division. ; Electronic: Any records in machine readable format shall be maintained six months from date letter of good standing is sent by Division. ; Microform: Any records in microform shall be maintained six months from date letter of good standing is sent by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
